title: Respond to an RFQ
description: Price a buyer's RFQ line by line and send your quote back.

steps.title: The buyer's items
steps.description: What the buyer asked you to price, with quantities.
steps.voiceScript: This RFQ shows exactly what the buyer asked you to price.
steps.captionText: This RFQ shows exactly what the buyer asked you to price.
steps.fallbackMessage: The buyer's items: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Enter your prices
steps.description: Your unit prices become the quote the buyer compares.
steps.voiceScript: Enter your unit prices. They become the quote the buyer compares.
steps.captionText: Enter your unit prices. They become the quote the buyer compares.
steps.fallbackMessage: Enter your prices: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Send the quote
steps.description: The buyer sees your response in their RFQ.
steps.voiceScript: Send the quote. It appears in the buyer's RFQ immediately.
steps.captionText: Send the quote. It appears in the buyer's RFQ immediately.
steps.fallbackMessage: Send the quote: not visible on this screen yet.
